description: You are a Platform Engineer at AcmeCorp. The CI/CD infrastructure is failing to spin up new environments. While the 'acme-prod' stack is running, attempting to start the 'acme-ci-test' stack in ~/projects/acme-ci-test/ results in a 'could not find an available, non-overlapping IPv4 address pool' error. Resolve this infrastructure limitation by reconfiguring the Docker daemon to support additional concurrent bridge networks. Ensure both the 'acme-prod' and 'acme-ci-test' stacks are successfully running and healthy. Login: user ga, password password123.
